Title: Move project to opportunity
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a account manager
I want to move a project back into opportunity tracking
So that prematurely promoted work can be corrected

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Project cards expose a move-to-opportunity action.
- [ ] The action warns when stakeholder associations may not carry over cleanly.
- [ ] Confirming creates the opportunity representation.
- [ ] Cancelling leaves the project unchanged.

Notes: Implemented as a recovery/correction workflow.
